/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/scoremanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tetris.dir/src/tetromino.cpp.o -o Tetris  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so -lSDL2_mixer
